steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The subject of the blank is "The reliability of the dates" — singular, because the head noun is 'reliability.' The blank must be a finite main verb that agrees with a singular subject in the present tense.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'depending': a non-finite participle; it cannot serve as the main verb of the clause. ✗
  • Choice B — 'depend': plural or infinitive form; does not agree with the singular subject 'reliability.' ✗
  • Choice C — 'having depended': a non-finite perfect participle; cannot serve as the main verb. ✗
  • Choice D — 'depends': singular present-tense verb that matches the singular subject 'reliability.' ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
